title: 我去，这真是海南陵水在推特官方打广告。。。

content.summary: 我去，这真是海南陵水在推特官方打广告。。。 Study in Lingshui－Li'an (@Lingshui_Lian) 🏛️Lingshui's Dan Art Museum is now open! The museum showcases a vibrant fusion of Lingshui’s cultural heritage. From Nov 15 to Feb 15, it's hosting the International Contemporary Art Exhibition "Spiritual Resonance Across Civilizations". Don't miss out! — https://nitter.net/Lingshui_Lian/status/1992274864544358846#m
